zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Sutton於1290年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾維福頓 霍爾時，她的父親Richard de Sutton24歲，母親Isabella Patrick30歲。她於1312年與Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾華索普結婚。她去世於1340年6月12日在英國林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Sutton于1290年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾維福頓 霍爾时，她的父亲Richard de Sutton24岁，母亲Isabella Patrick30岁。她于1312年与Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾華索普结婚。她去世于1340年6月12日在英国林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Sutton was born in 1290, in Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Richard de Sutton, was 24 and her mother, Isabella Patrick, was 30. She married Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell in 1312, in Warsop, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. She died on 12 June 1340, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Sutton est née en 1290, à Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Sutton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabella Patrick, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell en 1312, à Warsop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 12 juin 1340, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Sutton 1290 in Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Sutton 24 und ihre Mutter Isabella Patrick 30. Sie hat 1312 in Warsop, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell geheiratet. Sie starb am 12. Juni 1340 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Sutton è nata il nel 1290 nel Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Sutton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Isabella Patrick, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell nel 1312, nel Warsop, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 12 giugno 1340, nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Sutton(이)가 1290년 영국 노틴그함실르 위버턴 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Sutton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Patrick(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 워소프에서 Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1340년 6월 12일 영국 링코실르 언함에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Sutton nasceu em 1290, em Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Sutton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Patrick, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell em 1312, em Warsop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 12 de junho de 1340, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Sutton родилась в 1290 г. в местности вивиртон холл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Sutton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Patrick, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell в 1312 г. в местности варсоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 12 июня 1340 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Sutton nació en 1290, en Wiverton Hall, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Sutton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabella Patrick, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Galfridus Geoffrey Luttrell en 1312, en Warsop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 12 de junio de 1340, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
